ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  "brand_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wheel_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wheel model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the wheel */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the wheel model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the wheel model */,
  "model_release_date" TEXT /* Date the model was released */,
  "model_end_date" TEXT /* Date the model was discontinued (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wheel_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wheel_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wheel variant */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wheel model */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Item number of the wheel variant */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish of the wheel (e.g., Gloss Black Milled) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the wheel (e.g., 20x10.0) */,
  "lug_pattern" TEXT /* Primary lug pattern of the wheel (e.g., 5x127) */,
  "lug_pattern_2" TEXT /* Secondary lug pattern of the wheel (if applicable) */,
  "offset" INTEGER /* Offset of the wheel */,
  "hub_diameter" REAL /* Hub diameter of the wheel */,
  "variant_weight" REAL /* Weight of the wheel variant */,
  "variant_material" TEXT /* Material the wheel is made of */,
  "variant_tire_size" TEXT /* Recommended tire size for the wheel variant */,
  "variant_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image of the wheel variant */,
  "variant_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wheel_variants_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES wheel_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wheel variant */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wheel variant in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES wheel_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "location_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location in terms of number of wheels */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "location_manager" TEXT /* Name of the location manager */,
  "location_manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the location manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lug_patterns" (
  "lug_pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lug pattern */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the lug pattern (e.g., 5x127) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lug pattern */,
  "lug_pattern_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image of the lug pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lug_pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finish_types" (
  "finish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finish type */,
  "finish_name" TEXT /* Name of the finish type (e.g., Gloss Black Milled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the finish type */,
  "finish_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image of the finish type */,
  "finish_material" TEXT /* Material used for the finish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_variations" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size variation */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size variation (e.g., 20x10.0) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size variation */,
  "size_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image of the size variation */,
  "size_weight" REAL /* Typical weight of wheels in this size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  "user_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wheel variant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the wheel variant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the wheel variant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES wheel_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "order_payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid, partial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in an order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales order */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wheel variant in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wheel variant in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the wheel variant */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the wheel variant in the order */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "item_tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the item */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES sales_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES wheel_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_company" TEXT /* Company name of the customer (if applicable) */,
  "customer_vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the customer */,
  "customer_shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "customer_billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
